# Pull Request

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (existing behavior modified or removed)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Other (explain)

## Testing

How was this tested? List the scenarios you ran:

- [ ] `bash -n claude-mux` passes
- [ ] Manual smoke test (list/start/stop/restart)
- [ ] Targeted test for the change

## Checklist

- [ ] `VERSION=` bumped if user-visible change (see semver in CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if commands or features changed
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` updated if dev workflow changed
- [ ] Translations updated or flagged for re-translation
- [ ] Commit message follows `<type>: <description>` format
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff before pushing

## Related issues

Closes #...
